name: R Dev Container
postCreateCommand: R -e 'if (!require("shinyjs")) install.packages("shinyjs"); if (!require("bslib")) install.packages("bslib"); if (!require("cookies")) install.packages("cookies"); if (!require("googlesheets4")) install.packages("googlesheets4"); if (!require("tidyverse")) install.packages("tidyverse"); if (!require("rio")) install.packages("rio"); if (!require("ggplot2")) install.packages("ggplot2")'
